title: Fix test-harness reference script empty array bug
description: The analyze_field_utilization.sh script in 002-workspaces/test-harness-lab/reference-implementation/scripts/ has a bug where lines 177-179 attempt to use array expansion before checking if arrays are empty. With 'set -u' this causes unbound variable errors. Move array-to-JSON conversion inside the conditional blocks (lines 182-192) or add array length checks before printf. This is a P3 since it's educational reference code - users can fix or write their own scripts.
